title: Section 182B
content: 1[182B. Punishment for contravention of section 62A.--Whoever contravenes the provisions of section 62A, shall be punishable with fine which shall not be less than five thousand rupees, but may extend to ten thousand rupees.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 65, ibid., for section 182A (w.e.f. 1-9-2019).
